title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates using Claude Code (Anthropic's AI coding assistant) to build a revenue-generating product with no prior coding experience. The process involved five structured steps: problem-focused rapid shipping, strategic code generation versus existing solutions, learning vocabulary for better prompting, deliberate development methodology, and proactive error identification. The case study shows delivering 100,000 user adoption and $481,000 annual revenue in 45 days.
